title: uv as the Python Lockfile Floor
one_liner: Standardize Python projects on uv with committed uv.lock; agents always invoke commands via uv run.

title: pyproject.toml as the Single Source of Configuration
one_liner: Concentrate every Python tool's config in pyproject.toml; forbid setup.cfg, tox.ini, .flake8, pytest.ini.

title: TypeScript Strict + isolatedDeclarations + Project References
one_liner: Enable strict, noUncheckedIndexedAccess, exactOptionalPropertyTypes; libraries add isolatedDeclarations + composite refs.

title: pnpm Workspaces with Dependency Catalogs
one_liner: Use pnpm catalog: protocol for shared external deps and workspace:* for internal links to eliminate version drift.
